title: Amtech E0687 50mm (2") x 250mm (10") SDS Chisel
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This SDS chisel is made from drop forged, hardened and tempered steel for durability
VERSATILE: 50mm (2") x 250mm (10") in size, it fits all standard SDS machines
SIZE CAPACITY: 2 inch range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains Chisel bit See more
